nasb.text: Let them be as a snail which melts away as it goes along, Like the miscarriages of a woman which never see the sun.

esv.text: Let them be like the snail that dissolves into slime, like the stillborn child who never sees the sun.

cnv.text: 願他們像蝸牛般蠕行消融， 如同婦人流產未見天日的胎兒。

ccb.text: 愿他们像蜗牛一样溶为烂泥， 又如流产的胎儿不见天日。

csbs.text: 愿他们像蜗牛那样在爬行中消融， 又像女人流产的胎儿未见天日。
